name: Block Attacker IP — 24 Hours
description: Add source IP to WAF IP blacklist for 24 hours. Suitable for automated SQLi/XSS/LFI scanners.

name: Block Attacker IP — Permanent
description: Permanently blacklist IP after human review. Requires manager approval. For confirmed malicious actors.

name: Isolate Compromised Host
description: Isolate ECS instance from network via Security Center. Preserves forensic evidence. Reversible.

name: Apply Vulnerability Fix
description: Execute Security Center vulnerability fix (patching, config change). For verified CVEs with known fixes.

name: Notify Security Operations Only
description: Log event and notify SOC team without automated action. For MEDIUM/LOW severity events.
